title: Product Compliance 006 FY 23 24 Initiation of Self Attestation for Q3 F Y 2023 24 on New Product Compliance (PCOMP) Portal
text:
Nee)

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

NPCI/2023-24/0C/PD/006 24" January, 2024
To,
All Members participating in various NPC] Products

Sub: Initiation of Self-Attestation for Q3 F.Y. 2023-24 on New Product Compliance (PCOMP
Portal

Dear Sir / Madam,

We refer to the circular no. NPCI/UPI/OC-99/2020-21 dated 12" January 2021 on adherence to
NPCI guidelines by members / participants and Self-Attestation.

Self-Attestation is a process where members / participants declare themselves as compliant with
NPCI guidelines. The Self-Attestation checklist is based on documents — Procedural Guidelines,
Operating Circulars, Technical Specification Document, etc. Members / participants shall submit
Self-Attestation through PCOMP portal confirming Compliance. The Self-Attestation activity shall
be on a periodic basis such as annually / quarterly or as and when required.

We also refer to the circular no. NPCI/2023-24/PD/005 dated 28" December 2023 on New
PCOMP (Product Compliance) portal for Self-Attestation from F.Y. 2023-24 for Members /
Participants. The new portal is live and Self-attestation request for Q1 and Q2 of F.Y. 2023-24
along with directives which are to be complied with annually are made available.

This is to inform you that directives for Q3 of F.Y. 2023-24 have been updated on the New PCOMP
portal for Self-Attestation by members / participants. Members / participants to submit the self-
attestation by 31% March 2024.

Action for members/participants:

1. Self-Attestation for Q1 F.Y. 23-24 and Q2 F.Y. 23-24 has been initiated on 28" December
2023.

2. Self-Attestation for Q3 F.Y. 23-24 has been initiated on 19" January 2024.

3. All members / participants to complete the Self-Attestation for the above by 31%! March
2024.

Please note any non-adherence to completion of Self-Attestation process and non - compliance
observed will be liable for proper remedial actions and may further lead to penal actions by
Surveillance and Enforcement Team (S&E&) as per Circular no “NPCI/UPI/OC-99/2020-21”
(Annexure B) and Circular no “NPCI/UPI/OC-103/2020-21 (Annexure C).

Please make a note of the contents herein and disseminate the information contained herein to
the official concerned.

Yours Sincerely,
Sd/-

Kunal Kalawatia
Chief of Product

TOOIA, The Capital, B Wing, 10° Floor,

Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 051-
T: +91 22 40009100 F: +91 22 40009101
